meaning: n.傲慢的家伙,自以为了不起的年青人,不重要的人
examples: Is the Portuguese whippersnapper ready to compete immediately for a first-team place at Old Trafford when he arrives next season?
A final point: the word whippersnapper is a favourite of mine. It is deliciously evocative. My advice that I give with lingering regret: avoid.
